# Context Kernel v0.1.10

This release tightens the interactive chat output and makes prompt suggestions more reliable on Windows terminals.

## Highlights

- Default TUI assistant turns now display only the assistant answer.
- Run metadata is moved into the compact status line instead of being repeated in the transcript.
- `/` and `@` now explicitly open the completion menu when typed.
- Completion display uses a more visible readline-style menu.

## Validation

- `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
